prior_learnings.title: marmot-ts self-leave: propose single-leaf Remove for per-device forget, not group.leave()
prior_learnings.relevance: The spec explicitly warns against using mlsGroup.leave() because it emits a bare self-Remove proposal that freezes chat while unappliedProposals is non-empty. The out-of-band leave (kind-13) path must stay intact.

auto_promote_block_to_delete.description: Block that promotes every invited member to admin. To be deleted along with adminPromotionFailed flag and warning return path.
dead_code_cascade: MarmotContextValue.warning field on inviteByNpub return type

grant_admin_template.description: Pure Deps-injected impl file. grantAdmin should follow the same extraction pattern: re-read live adminPubkeys, evaluate superset guard, Proposals.proposeUpdateMetadata, single commit, reloadGroups + markBackupDirty.

confirmation_modal_template.description: useDisclosure + isCancelling state + handleConfirm async function pattern. 'Cancel invite' button+modal is the exact template for 'Make admin' button+modal.

is_admin_gate_groups_page.description: isAdmin computed inline from mlsGroup?.groupData?.adminPubkeys. Already gates invite-member-btn, invite-link-btn (isDisabled), manage-links and PendingRequestsSection (conditional render).

leave_group_button.description: Receives groupId prop; calls useMarmot() directly. Last-admin guard needs adminPubkeys + ownPubkeyHex props from groups.tsx (where both are already available).

architecture.paradigm: Modular Next.js app; MarmotContext owns all MLS logic; page coordinator (groups.tsx) derives UI state; presentational components receive props only.

module_map.name: MarmotContext
module_map.description: Owns all MLS interactions. New: grantAdmin method, pendingRemovals getter exposed via context. Remove: auto-promote block.

module_map.name: grantAdminImpl
module_map.description: Pure Deps-injected impl for grantAdmin. Mirrors cancelInvitationImpl.ts.

module_map.name: MemberList
module_map.description: Fully prop-driven presentational. New props: adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, onMakeAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys.

module_map.name: LeaveGroupButton
module_map.description: New props: adminPubkeys, ownPubkeyHex for last-admin guard.

module_map.name: GroupsPage
module_map.description: Coordinator. Derives isAdmin, adminPubkeys, pendingRemovalPubkeys; passes new props to MemberList and LeaveGroupButton; wires onMakeAdmin handler.

module_map.name: i18n
module_map.description: New Copy keys: makeAdminButton, makeAdminTitle, makeAdminBody, makeAdminConfirm, adminBadge, lastAdminLeaveBlocked, leavePendingBadge, removalPendingBadge.

key_data_flows.groupDataVersion_signal: MLS commit lands → onMembersChanged callback → setGroupDataVersion(v+1) → useEffect in groups.tsx fires → getMarmotGroup re-fetches mlsGroup → isAdmin recomputes
key_data_flows.pendingRemovals: kind-13 intent received → enqueueLeave appends to pendingRemovalsRef → (new) getPendingRemovals(groupId) accessor on context → groups.tsx reads on groupDataVersion tick → passed to MemberList as pendingRemovalPubkeys
key_data_flows.grantAdmin_commit: onMakeAdmin(pubkey) → grantAdmin(groupId, pubkey) → re-read live adminPubkeys → superset guard → proposeUpdateMetadata → single commit → reloadGroups + markBackupDirty → groupDataVersion bumped by onMembersChanged

seam_contracts.MarmotContext_to_GroupsPage: MarmotContextValue gains: grantAdmin(groupId, pubkey): Promise<{ok, error?}>, getPendingRemovals(groupId): string[]
seam_contracts.GroupsPage_to_MemberList: MemberList gains props: adminPubkeys: string[], isCurrentUserAdmin: boolean, onMakeAdmin?: (pubkey: string) => Promise<void>, pendingRemovalPubkeys: string[]
seam_contracts.GroupsPage_to_LeaveGroupButton: LeaveGroupButton gains props: adminPubkeys: string[], ownPubkeyHex: string | null

architecture.architectural_constraint: pendingRemovalsRef is a useRef (not useState) internal to MarmotProvider — not exposed via context. Must add getPendingRemovals(groupId): string[] accessor on MarmotContextValue; groups.tsx reads it on groupDataVersion tick.

e2e_infrastructure.groups_command: make test-e2e-groups (starts docker strfry on :7777, E2E_GROUPS=1 node scripts/run-e2e.mjs)
e2e_infrastructure.config: app/playwright.config.ts — workers: 1, E2E_GROUPS=1 env gates groups-*.spec.ts

two_context_pattern.description: Each spec defines local bootUser() function: browser.newContext + suppressErrorOverlay + addInitScript(lp_nostrIdentity_v1) + clearAppState + page.goto('/groups/')
two_context_pattern.serial: test.describe.serial for all multi-user scenarios; contexts held across steps in beforeAll/afterAll
two_context_pattern.user_keypairs: auth-helpers.ts defines USER_A/B/C; computeTestKeypairs() required before use

existing_admin_spec.conflict: Currently tests that invited members are auto-promoted to admin (lines 141-147, 164-168). MUST be rewritten to test the new non-promotion default and the explicit grant flow.

i18n_structure.namespace: copy.groups.* for all new group-related strings

unit_test_conventions.pattern: vi.mock() at top, dynamic import after, describe/it blocks, beforeEach clears
